notes.result: CLEAN. Set declared at line 58. revealNode calls wrapped in try/catch in both revealLocationsByQuestId (lines 85-91) and _drainPendingReveals (lines 112-117).

CLEAN. Line 110 fires revealLocationsByQuestId(questId) WITHOUT a scene argument — so the call always routes through the queue path (revealLocationsByQuestId checks `scene && scene.scene && scene.scene.key === 'WorldMapScene'` at line 78-82; without scene, queue is used). This means timing-vs-state.activeQuest doesn't matter — the queue drains on next WorldMapScene mount when state has long since been persisted. Call also wrapped in try/catch at lines 109-114 so any bridge failure can't break quest start.

notes.check: Bug fix correctness — does this actually unblock bridge_collapse?
notes.result: VERIFIED. Trace: player on bridge_collapse step 6 → save loads → GameContainer line 302 fires triggerQuestRevealsForState(savedState) → bridge looks up DISCOVERY_UNLOCKS reverse map for 'bridge_collapse' → finds copper_mine entry → queues 'copper_mine' in _pendingReveals → player navigates to WorldMap → WorldMapScene.create() runs → _drainPendingQuestReveals(this) at line 200 → calls this.revealNode('copper_mine') → revealArea + saveGame + redrawFog → copper_mine node + path to it become visible. Player walks to copper_mine, gets surface_copper or deep_copper, CopperMineScene's existing band-aid (lines 30-45) maps to copper_ore_sample, quest advances. Combined with Fix C (which de-circles MountainScene via questsAnyOrActive), the soft-lock is fully eliminated.
